narrative:
Butler Twp township has 2,505 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
